settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage the app and learn more

about.noAds: No ads, no trackers, no data collection.

support.description: Help us keep LibreOTP free and independent.

security.selfHostSubtitleEmpty: Set up your own PocketBase server
security.selfHostGuideTitle: How do I host my own server?
security.selfHostGuideSubtitle: Check out the guide on GitHub (README).
security.resetSubtitle: Permanently deletes all your accounts and keys from this device.

lock.description: Protect LibreOTP with a code, and Face ID / fingerprint if your device supports it.
lock.codeLockSubtitle: A 4-digit code will be required on launch.
lock.disabledBody: The app will no longer ask for a code on launch.
lock.enabledBody: Your code has been saved successfully.

pinModal.title: Set a code
pinModal.subtitle: Choose a 4-digit code. You'll be asked for it every time you open the app.

selfHostModal.title: Self-hosting
selfHostModal.subtitle: Enter the URL of your own PocketBase server to sync your keys to it.
selfHostModal.errorEmptyUrl: Please enter a valid PocketBase URL.
selfHostModal.successBody: Your PocketBase server is correctly configured.
selfHostModal.unreachableBody: The URL was saved, but the server isn't responding right now.

resetModal.title: Confirm deletion
resetModal.subtitle: Are you sure you want to delete ALL of your security keys? This action is irreversible and you'll lose your two-factor access if you don't have a backup.

add.title: Add a key
add.subtitle: Select an add method

qr.title: Scan QR Code
qr.description: Scan the two-factor authentication code shown by the service (Google, GitHub, etc.) to add it automatically.

add.invalidKeyBody: The secret key must be in Base32 format (letters A-Z, digits 2-7).

scan.permissionText: We need access to your camera to scan the authentication QR code.
scan.scanSubtitle: Frame the QR code anywhere on screen
scan.galleryPermissionBody: Allow access to your photos to scan a QR code from an image.
scan.noCodeFoundBody: No QR code was detected in this image.
scan.readErrorBody: Unable to read the QR code from this image.

home.title: LibreOTP
home.subtitle: Simple & modern security
home.emptySubtitle: Start by adding or scanning a security key.

singleOtp.tapToCopy: Tap a code to copy it

editModal.title: Edit name
editModal.subtitle: Enter a new name for this account.

synchro.title: Sync
synchro.subtitle: Protect and transfer your authentication keys

cloud.description: Sync your end-to-end encrypted keys across all your devices. The encryption password is never sent to the server.
cloud.missingFieldsBody: Please enter your email and password.
cloud.authSuccessBody: You're now connected to the cloud.
cloud.registerFailedBody: Unable to create the account (email already used or invalid).
cloud.loggedOutBody: You've been logged out of the cloud.

local.description: Export your accounts to an encrypted text file using a custom password, or import an existing file.

exportModal.title: Encrypt backup
exportModal.subtitle: Set a password to encrypt your file. Keep it safe — it's required to recover your accounts!
exportModal.sharingUnavailableBody: Sharing isn't available on this device.

importModal.title: Decrypt backup
importModal.subtitle: Enter the password that was used to encrypt this backup file.

cloudModal.saveSubtitle: Choose an encryption password. You'll need it to restore your data later — the server never knows it.
cloudModal.restoreSubtitle: Enter the encryption password used during your last cloud backup.
cloudModal.savedBody: Your keys have been saved to the cloud (encrypted).
cloudModal.saveFailedBody: Unable to save to the cloud.
cloudModal.restoredBody: Your keys have been restored from the cloud!
cloudModal.notFoundBody: No backup was found for this account.
